initiatives.name: SURJ Worcester
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in Worcester and Central Massachusetts. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through racial justice education and accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.

initiatives.name: Woo Fridge
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective coordinating community fridges and food distribution initiatives in Worcester. They organize direct support through free food access, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through food justice and community care.

initiatives.name: Solidarity.Outreach.Survival
initiatives.description: Harm reduction collective in Nipmuc Territory (Worcester, MA)

initiatives.name: Homeless Addicts Leadership Organization
initiatives.description: Membership based organization of homeless drug users who are ready to fight for change within our community

initiatives.name: Worcester Solidarity Coalition
initiatives.description: Standing our ground for justice, equality, and human rights; by any means necessary
